jobs.title: Business Systems Analyst – Project Management Platforms
jobs.description:
About the position

Project Ignite is a large-scale enterprise transformation program uniting 20+ operating companies onto a single Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations and Project Operations platform. We are building a deployment factory designed to roll out several entities per year — from common-stack migrations to mid-complexity entities with distinct operational models, service delivery structures, and customer-facing workflows.
